_note: 1994-2024 curated from Sports-Reference per-season player tables (players_per_game), each row citing its SR season page. 2025-26 (2024-25, 2025-26 seasons) sourced from ESPN's keyless API (site.api roster + sports.core.api per-athlete season averages), each row citing the player's ESPN page. Medical-redshirt years declared via redshirtYears. ESPN-first for recent seasons, SR/Wikipedia fallback for older ones — see docs/DATA-SOURCING.md.
